basic_details.job_title: PM SHRI School JNV Kandhamal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Teachers/ Experts Posts

age_limit.age_details: Up to 40 years for most posts, up to 59 years for others
age_limit.details: Up to 40 years for most posts. Up to 59 years for other posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Two years Diploma in Radio Diagnoses Technology or B.Sc Radiography, Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT), B.Sc/Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology with experience, Bachelors/Master's in Occupational Therapy, Bachelor's in Speech and Language Pathology, Diploma Nursing Therapy
qualification.details: Radiographer: Must have passed Two years Diploma course in Radio Diagnoses Technology or a Degree in B.Sc. (Radiography and imaging Technology) / B.Sc (Radio Diagnosis Technology) and B.Sc (Radiology and imaging Technology). Physiotherapist: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) from a recognized university. ICTC - Lab Technicians: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT) or BMLS, or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT) or DMLS with a course duration of at least 2 years. Essential Experience: Two years of experience for B.Sc/Diploma holders, one year for M.Sc holders. Occupational Therapist - DEIC's - One staff Centre: Bachelors/Master's Degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized university. Audiologist cum speech Therapist- DEIC: Bachelor's Degree in Speech and Language Pathology from any recognized university in India. Therapeutic Assistant Musculoskeletal Scheme Female-1: Diploma Nursing Therapy. Therapeutic Assistant (Female): Diploma Nursing Therapy. Nursing Therapist/ Therapeutic Assistant: Diploma Nursing Therapy (D.N.T) AYUSH.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Occupational Therapist - DEIC's - One staff Centre

salary_details.details: Radiographer: Rs. 17,000 Physiotherapist: Rs. 23,000 ICTC - Lab Technicians: Rs. 17,000 Occupational Therapist - DEIC's - One staff Centre: Rs. 23,000 Audiologist cum speech Therapist- DEIC: Rs. 32,000 Therapeutic Assistant Musculoskeletal Scheme Female-1: Rs. 15,000 Therapeutic Assistant (Female): Rs. 13,000 Nursing Therapist/ Therapeutic Assistant: Rs. 13,000

selection_process: Interview Score card Weightage of Marks
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Namakkal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: namakkal.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DHS Namakkal Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PM SHRI School JNV Kandhamal recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for email submission is 30 June 2026. The walk-in interview dates are 29 June 2026 and 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teachers/Experts posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies for various Teachers/Experts posts at PM SHRI School JNV Kandhamal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Lab Attendant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Lab Attendant post is 10th Class pass with a certificate/Diploma in laboratory Technique or 12th class with a science stream.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Caretaker post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Caretaker post is between 30 to 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Skill teacher for Artificial Intelligence (AI) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Skill teacher for Artificial Intelligence (AI) post is Rs. 30,000/- Per Month for 10 months.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at PM SHRI School JNV Kandhamal, Phulbani, Odisha, 762002.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to carry original testimonials, one set of self-attested Xerox copies, and two recent colour photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for PM SHRI Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya?
faq.answer: The official website for PM SHRI Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya is https://navodaya.gov.in/nvs/nvs-school/Phulbani/en/home/.
